title: hieracium alpinum subsp. tubulosum
intro: Hieracium alpinum subsp. tubulosum, also known as Alpine Hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Alpine Hawkweed include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and astringent, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Alpine Hawkweed can be prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flowers for medicinal purposes, although further research and proper identification are recommended due to potential lookalike plants.
